metas.name: To You in the Beyond
metas.description:
Genres: Mystery, Romance Tags: The story centers on a boy named Kazuki Tsukigase, who transfers to a high school on a remote island to get away from anyone who knows him. Kazuki finds out that there is an inlet on the island where people are rumored to disappear. Exploring the inlet, he encounters an unconscious girl. When she comes to after Kazuki takes her to the clinic, she is unable to give out anything about her identity except that she is named Nao, is 16 years old, and whispers the year "1974."

(Source: Anime News Network, edited)

metas.name: Soukou Kihei Votoms: Haiiro no Hexe
metas.description:
Genres: Mecha, Sci-Fi Tags:Real Robot In January 2026, Bandai Namco Filmworks announced an new anime project titled Armored Trooper VOTOMS: Die Graue Hexe. It is set to premiere in 2026 will be produced by Sunrise with production assistance by Production I.G, and will be part of a series of projects commemorating studio Sunrise's 50th anniversary to be released between 2026 and 2028.

Note: Relations are provisional and subject to change.

metas.name: Norman the Snowman: Kodomo-tachi no Hitotsuboshi
metas.description:
Genres: Fantasy Tags: The boy has grown into a young man, living apart from his mother. Although he returned to his hometown, he is unable to be honest with her. After reuniting with Norman, a mysterious child searching for "snow flowers" suddenly appears before them. Norman and the young man venture into the snow-covered forest with the child.

(Source: Official site)
